description_long: This is a compact, freestanding kitchen cart or utility cabinet with a dark-painted wooden frame and a contrasting natural wood top. The top surface is thick and smooth, suitable for food preparation or as an extra workspace. Below the top, there is a single pull-out drawer with a rounded handle, ideal for storing utensils or small items. The open lower section features two spacious shelves for additional storage, framed by sturdy side supports. The entire unit stands on four caster wheels, making it easy to move around urban environments such as kitchens, garages, or workshops. The design is both functional and stylish, blending modern and rustic elements.
description: A compact, dark-framed kitchen cart with a natural wood top, a drawer, two open shelves, and caster wheels for mobility.
description_view_0: Front view showing the drawer with handle, two open shelves, and all four wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the wood top and the open shelving structure.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front but without the drawer handle, showing the open shelves and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the wood top thickness and open shelving.
